body: review-spec cycle 1 REQUEST_CHANGES (3 HIGH, 4 MEDIUM, 3 LOW). Addressed inline: ac-01 pins N=5 + effort scale S/M/L; ac-04 extended with missing-remediation.verb fallback (use evidence verbatim); ac-05 reworked to differentiate from orbit overview verb (dropped /orb:handover ref since card 0036 not shipped); ac-06 reframed to measurable bound (<=20 lines / ~500 tokens). New: ac-07 pins skill name /orb:prioritise and path; ac-08 pins deterministic ranking algorithm; ac-09 covers empty-substrate fallback. LOW findings accepted: ac-03 enforcement is prose-only by design (matches existing read-only skills); mid-session invocation covered implicitly by ac-02 (now stated explicitly).
